speaker: PARIS
text: It is great morning, and the hour prefixed

speaker: PARIS
text: For her delivery to this valiant Greek

speaker: PARIS
text: Comes fast upon. Good my brother Troilus,

speaker: PARIS
text: Tell you the lady what she is to do

speaker: PARIS
text: And haste her to the purpose.

speaker: TROILUS
text: I’ll bring her to the Grecian presently;

speaker: TROILUS
text: And to his hand when I deliver her,

speaker: TROILUS
text: Think it an altar and thy brother Troilus

speaker: TROILUS
text: A priest there off’ring to it his own heart.

speaker: PARIS
text: And would, as I shall pity, I could help.—

speaker: PARIS
text: Please you walk in, my lords?
